awesomeList.descriptionHTML: A curated list of awesome command-line frameworks, toolkits, guides and gizmos. Inspired by awesome-php.
awesomeList.description: A curated list of awesome command-line frameworks, toolkits, guides and gizmos. Inspired by awesome-php.
